priority: Deterministic sockets loopback and local stream subset
scope: Unix-domain stream create/bind/listen/connect/accept where AF_UNIX is available
Socket local and peer address reporting
non_scope: UDP, socket_select, nonblocking, timeouts, ancillary data, addrinfo helpers, stream import/export, and Windows helpers
next_step: Expand remaining socket_* functions behind deterministic loopback or host-capability gates.
